title: Signs of stronger demand boosts sentiment in commodity markets
section_path: Signs of stronger demand boosts sentiment in commodity markets
section_path_text: Signs of stronger demand boosts sentiment in commodity markets
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets were buoyed by better-than-expected data. Energy led the gains, as the positive demand backdrop met ongoing supply issues. Image reference: $1.png | assets/2022-08-15_signs-of-stronger-demand-boosts-sentiment-in-commodity-markets_img_241_9f06b813b77b.png
Crude oil posted a weekly gain, despite edging lower on Friday as the prospect of stronger demand improved.
